core_principle: Position as what market WANTS (title/thumbnail) → deliver what they NEED (video content)

niched.name: Niched Packaging
niched.description: Title/thumbnail clearly identifies your niche. Plays to search + recommended.
niched.best_for: Building authority in a specific topic

shareability.name: Shareability Format
shareability.description: Attach your message to a broader trend/celebrity/cultural moment. Niche value inside.
shareability.best_for: Reaching new audiences outside your niche
shareability.title_strategy: Lead with trending topic, weave in your expertise

thumbnail_rules.text_purpose: Reinforce storyline — does NOT rewrite the title
thumbnail_rules.colors: Green and Blue = higher click rate (psychology)

youtube_priority: Payoff at the end to hold viewer retention
clickbait_rule: Clickbait + deliver value = viewer fulfilled = NOT clickbait. Clickbait only when video fails to deliver.

steps.name: Video Framing
steps.description: The raw idea — 'I want to make a video about {topic}'

steps.name: Packaging Framing
steps.description: Create the title — what the video is about (what market WANTS)

steps.name: Directional Framing
steps.description: Add specificity — who, what circumstances, unique angle

steps.name: Grand Payoff
steps.description: The overarching question the viewer must stay to answer

checklist: I am passionate about this specific angle
It evokes an emotional response (fear, anger, desire, hope)
It opens multiple curiosity gaps (not Google-answerable)
